race.comment: MIDNIGHT OPAL (7) holding his form and had genuine excuses when anchored with the 60kg for a battling seventh over 1300m at this track. Key jockey change and drops in weight from the good gate. Proven in all going and can get the better of these at the good odds. SMASHING TIME (12) smart on-pace sprinter who jumps sharply in grade after scoring two slick wins in Midway class. Can take control from the good gate and prove hard to run down with the 3kg claimer engaged. EYE OF THE FIRE (5) smart fresh gelding who showed good early speed first-up with a fighting second over 1200m at Randwick in BM94 class. Clearly come back well and expected to go close. DARK GLITTER (4) courageous mare who always gives her all. Stalked the speed and couldn't get a crack at them in the straight when fourth at Randwick in stronger grade over this trip. Sticky gate but keep safe at the good odds. MEMORIA (11) in need of the run first-up and maps to get the right run today. Has claims.
